name: omlx-qwen35
description: Local MLX (omlx) running the Qwen3.5-9B-DeepSeek-V4-Flash-4bit model. Requires thinking_budget>0 to escape unbounded CoT loops. api_key_env defaults to OMLX_API_KEY; set base_url to point at the host's omlx server (the lab-web-actions layer rewrites it to host.docker.internal for containers).
